title: CAM, TT&A, WvT, Trowers & Hamlins act on ACEN India securing ₹751 crore funding for 100 MW wind project in Karnataka
description: ACEN India unit Diyos Renewables India Project Private Limited has secured a term loan facility and non-fund based facilities aggregating to ₹751 crore from MUFG Bank, Ltd. and Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised Diyos Renewables India Project on this transaction.The transaction team was led by Subhojit Sadhu (Partner, Director (CAM - Middle East), with support from Shehryar Khanum (Consultant), Kavya Mathur (Senior Associate) and Kriti Chaturvedi (Associate).Su
